steps.title: Find the subject head
steps.content: The subject is its similarity to each of the 32 soil reference groups. The head noun is similarity, which is singular. The phrase to each of the 32 soil reference groups does not make the subject plural.

steps.title: Match agreement and tense
steps.content: Choice A and choice B use plural verb forms that do not agree with similarity. Choice D is singular but past tense, clashing with the present-tense context of is classified and is found. The singular present form fits the passive verb phrase. The answer is C.
